Implementation commit ea70167fb10afead7d1654bbee7c819b18ca6ccb; landed by merge 2d7a8452a. Focused TestLoadPressureSnapshot_NormalizesByCPUCount and TestWorkLoop_LoadPressure* gate passed on the merged main tree. Full internal/workerstatus + internal/agent package gate passed (agent 253.7s). Config/cmd/server production wiring tests passed. Standalone pre-commit passed after the final patch, and the commit-triggered pre-commit passed in 519.0s across cmd, agent, config, server, and workerstatus.
summary: All acceptance and repository gates passed

body: Verified pacing occurs after complexity acceptance and before final candidate refresh and Claim; nil sampler is a no-op; try/work/server wire the real sampler; loop.load_pressure_backoff is best-effort telemetry with required fields; cancellation leaves zero claims, lease, attempt, cooldown, and executor calls; invalid and unsupported sources fail open; threshold config/schema/clone are wired. Numeric follow-up review also PASS: tiny/non-finite thresholds and extreme ratios clamp safely before time.Duration conversion while 3/2.5 remains exactly 6s.
